name: Guacamole Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh lemon or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chili pepper to taste.
2. Chop the onion, garlic, and peeled tomato.
3. Blend with mashed avocado halves (remove seed and skin).
4. Add the chili mixture to the blender.
5. Blend in the lemon or lime juice, salt, pepper, seasoned salt, and dry mustard.
6. Serve with crackers, corn chips, potato chips, or tortillas.
7. Makes 1 1/2 cups dip.
